creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
kwm         2011-08-04 07:54:39 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    x11-toolkits/gtk20   Makefile 
  Added files:
    x11-toolkits/gtk20/files patch-gdk_gdkwindow.c 
  Log:
  Add a upstream patch that revert a patch that was committed for 2.24.5. This
  patch causes issues for some GTK applications like freeciv (the main map
  stays black).
  
  PR:             ports/159510
  Submitted by:   scf@
  Obtained from:  GTK git
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.252     +1 -1      ports/x11-toolkits/gtk20/Makefile
  1.1       +51 -0     ports/x11-toolkits/gtk20/files/patch-gdk_gdkwindow.c (new)
